title: Rosewood Large Mint Ring – Durable Nylon Chew Toy for Large Dogs 20kg+ | Promotes Dental Hygiene | Long-Lasting Mint Flavour | 14cm Ring Shape
features: DURABLE DESIGN FOR STRONG CHEWERS: Made from tough nylon, this chew toy is built to withstand chewing, providing hours of enjoyment for large dogs
SATISFIES NATURAL CHEWING INSTINCTS: Keeps your dog engaged and helps redirect destructive chewing habits onto a safe and fun toy
SUPPORTS DENTAL HYGIENE: The textured surface helps clean teeth and massage gums, reducing plaque and tartar buildup for healthier teeth
DELICIOUS MINT FLAVOUR: Infused with an irresistible mint taste that keeps your dog coming back for more
PERFECT FOR LARGE DOGS: Specifically designed for large breeds (20kg+) this 20cm bone-shaped toy is the ideal size for powerful jaws
description: From the manufacturer Rosewood Here at Rosewood, we’ve been keeping dogs, cats, birds, rabbits, hamsters, fish in fact all sorts of pets happy for over half a century. That means sourcing and making top quality, great value products for retailers. We know that customers regard their pets not as animals, but as part of the family. We do, too. That’s how it should be. They’re pet parents, not just owners. That’s why we put so much effort into providing the very best, at the very best prices. From toys to treats to collars to bedding, our range is unsurpassed. We look for great ideas and top quality and where we can’t find it, we develop our own. Rosewood large tough and durable chew and teething ring shaped toy for medium and large dogs made of tough nylon Mint flavoured and scented, Green, transparent We've refreshed The justifiable popular range of 100percentage nylon toys with new textures and packaging. With cooked in flavours of mint or chocolate each nylon toy will encourage frequent chewing/gnawing and help to promote healthy teeth and gums. They're designed to last, even with determined chewers, so it's good to know they can be easily cleaned, even in boiling water.
